allow: Bash(python -c "from app.schemas.restaurant import RestaurantFull, RestaurantAdminOut; print\('OK'\)")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./docs/swagger.json'\); const paths=Object.keys\(s.paths\).filter\(p=>p.startsWith\('/owner'\)||p==='/upload'\); for\(const p of paths\){for\(const m of Object.keys\(s.paths[p]\)\){console.log\(m.toUpperCase\(\),p\)}}")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./docs/swagger.json'\); const names=['MenuItemOwner','MenuItemCreate','MenuItemUpdate','MenuItemAvailabilityUpdate','MenuCategoryOwner','MenuCategoryCreate','MenuCategoryUpdate','UploadResponse']; for\(const n of names\){console.log\('==',n\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(s.components.schemas[n],null,2\)\)}")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./docs/swagger.json'\); const paths=['/owner/menu','/owner/menu/{id}','/owner/menu/{id}/availability','/owner/menu-categories','/owner/menu-categories/{id}','/upload']; for\(const p of paths\){console.log\('===',p\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(s.paths[p],null,2\)\)}")
